power_integrity.description: All power pins must be connected to correct voltage rail

ground_integrity.description: All VSS pins must be connected to ground

config_pins.description: MODE0/1/2, DONE, READY, RECONFIG_N must be properly connected

unused_io.description: Unused IO pins should be left unconnected or tied to ground via resistor

vcco_consistency.description: All VCCIO pins in same bank must connect to same voltage

diff_pair_integrity.description: Both pins of a differential pair must be used together

link_reach_guidance.note: For rates above 8 Gbps, official current product page guidance limits MG132 to board-level interconnect.
For rates above 8 Gbps, official current product page guidance limits MG132 to board-level interconnect.

refclk_requirements.selection_note: Refclk frequency, clock standard, jitter budget, and pair-to-quad mapping must be frozen against the selected protocol before schematic sign-off.

power_domain_map.description: 内部 LDO 模块电源（为 SRAM 和 PLL 供电）

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 满足电流需求下，可与同电压电源合并
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 满足电流需求下，可与同电压电源合并

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 满足电流需求下，可与同电压电源合并
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 满足电流需求下，可与同电压电源合并

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 电压一致可合并，**建议用低噪声电源（LDO）**
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 电压一致可合并，**建议用低噪声电源（LDO）**

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 可合并，但**噪声大，不要和其他电源合并**
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 可合并，但**噪声大，不要和其他电源合并**

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 满足电流需求下可合并
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 满足电流需求下可合并

rail_merge_guidelines.conditions: 满足电流需求下可合并
rail_merge_guidelines.recommendation: 满足电流需求下可合并

pin_connection_rules.rule: Keep high during power-up; release after power is stable for 1 ms.
Reconfiguration requires a low pulse of at least 25 ns.
External pull-up required for open-drain READY output.
External pull-up required for open-drain DONE output.
When used as GPIO input, keep the initial value high before configuration.
Tie high when configuration-bank VCCIO is at least 2.5 V.
Tie low when configuration-bank VCCIO is at most 1.8 V.
Bias PUDC_B through a 1k resistor to VCCIO or GND.
Bias MODE straps with 4.7K pull-up and 1K pull-down resistors.
If SSPI is unused, pull SSPI_HOLDN low or pull SSPI_CSN high.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Cross-domain isolation and ferrite-bead filtering are recommended.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Cross-domain isolation and ferrite-bead filtering are recommended.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Cross-domain isolation and ferrite-bead filtering are recommended.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Use a low-noise LDO if merged.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Do not merge with other noisy rails.

decoupling_requirements.filter_type: ferrite bead isolation plus ceramic capacitor
decoupling_requirements.notes: Use ferrite-bead isolation for MIPI-sensitive rails.

clock_design_rules.requirement: AC-couple the SerDes high-speed reference clock close to the FPGA pins.
clock_design_rules.notes: Applies to high-speed SerDes reference-clock inputs.

clock_design_rules.requirement: Prefer a dedicated GCLK_T pin for single-ended system clocks.
Prefer a dedicated PLL_T pin for single-ended PLL clock inputs.
Bias the crystal supply with a ferrite bead and local decoupling.

configuration_mode_support.notes: Align VCCIO with the JTAG bank voltage.

io_standard_rules.requirement: Use internal programmable 100Ω differential input termination where supported.
io_standard_rules.applies_to: GW5AT-15/GW5AT-60 all regions; GW5AT-138/GW5AT-75 top and bottom regions only

io_standard_rules.requirement: Provide VREF for SSTL/HSTL using internal 0.5x VCCIO or an external VREF input.
io_standard_rules.applies_to: Banks using SSTL/HSTL inputs or outputs

design_guideline_text.guideline: Use ferrite-bead isolation between different voltage domains.
Prefer a dedicated supply for VCC; do not merge noisy VDDTQ rails with other domains.
Place SerDes reference-clock AC coupling close to the FPGA pins.
Use dedicated clock input pins for system and PLL clocks when available.
All banks support true LVDS output; review package-specific input-termination scope before reusing family capability.
MODE straps should use resistor networks instead of hard ties whenever possible.
